headline: Warren Buffett Owns 3 Strong Buy Dividend Aristocrat Giants—1 for Almost 40 Years
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as chief executive of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio ... Warren Buffett Owns 3 Strong Buy Dividend Aristocrat Giants—1 for Almost 40 Years
